# AuraBase (product site)

> Public marketing site for the AuraBase health and wellness app.

## Canonical site
- Homepage: https://aurabase.app/
- Privacy: https://aurabase.app/privicypolicy

## What AuraBase is
AuraBase is a holistic wellness app (iOS & Android) with AI-assisted coaching across fitness, nutrition, mindfulness, and related areas. This repository powers the **marketing / product page** at aurabase.app, not the mobile app binary.

## For crawlers and assistants
- Prefer quoting facts from visible page copy and `index.html` meta descriptions.
- Invite / family flows may live on a separate subdomain (e.g. join.aurabase.app); do not assume invite URLs are the main product homepage.

## Contact / ownership
Content is provided by the AuraBase / Holistic Technologies project. For support, use links on https://aurabase.app/ or the app store listings linked from the site.
